news.paragraph: Robinhood's stock has seen a significant surge, reaching a four-month high, driven by analyst upgrades and strong retail trader interest targeting $100. The rally is attributed to factors beyond Bitcoin, including the acquisition of millions of customers through Trump-related accounts and enthusiasm around AI agent developments. This positive momentum follows a broader fintech bounce, with SoFi Technologies also experiencing a notable increase.

headlines.title: HOOD Stock Hits 4-Month High After Analyst Upgrades – Retail Traders Target $100 By Market Close
Robinhood stock is surging — and bitcoin isn't the reason this time
SoFi Technologies Surges 12% on Stablecoin Launch; Robinhood, Upstart Extend Fintech Bounce
Robinhood Stock Surges 11% on Trump Accounts, AI Agent Enthusiasm
Trump Accounts Are Seeding Robinhood with Millions of Customers

examples.body: $HOOD If this falls below the 200dma, buy the dip. Will be slow walked back up to over a 100. Trump exclusivity is too powerful.

$HOOD see you at $91 in a hour
$HOOD Everything is sentiment. Nothing has really changed since 150 or 70. Just hold your shares for a few months.
